requirement: Identify and document a lawful basis before processing any personal data.
control: Implement a documentation process to record the legal justification (Consent, Contract, Legal Obligation, or Legitimate Interests) for all data processing.

requirement: The Data Protection Officer (DPO) must maintain a Record of Processing Activities (ROPA).
control: Create and maintain a ROPA log documenting the lawful basis and purpose for each processing activity in accordance with GDPR Article 30.

requirement: Personal data must be retained only for as long as necessary and retention schedules must be enforced.
control: Implement and automate data retention and deletion schedules across all systems.

requirement: Retention of Customer Personal Data for duration of contract plus 7 years.
control: Configure data lifecycle management policies to delete customer data 7 years post-contract termination.

requirement: Retention of Security Logs & Audit Trails for a minimum of 12 months (rolling).
control: Configure log management systems (SIEM) to retain security and audit logs for at least 1 year.

requirement: Respond to Data Subject Access Requests (DSAR) within 30 calendar days.
control: Establish a DSAR response workflow with automated tracking and alerts for the 30-day deadline.

requirement: All user accounts must be provisioned through the Identity and Access Management (IAM) system; shared accounts are prohibited.
control: Implement a centralized IAM system and disable all shared or generic credentials.

requirement: Enforce Multi-factor authentication (MFA) for remote access, privileged accounts, and systems holding sensitive data.
control: Deploy MFA across all VPNs, administrative interfaces, and sensitive databases.

requirement: Access rights must be reviewed quarterly and terminated accounts deactivated within 24 hours.
control: Conduct quarterly access certification reviews and integrate HR systems with IAM for automated offboarding.

requirement: Use TLS 1.2 or higher for all data transmitted over public or untrusted networks.
control: Configure web servers and network protocols to disable SSL, TLS 1.0, and TLS 1.1; enforce TLS 1.2+.

requirement: All devices storing personal data must use AES-256 full-disk encryption.
control: Deploy Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) or MDM solutions to enforce AES-256 encryption on laptops and mobile devices.

requirement: Production databases containing personal data must implement Transparent Data Encryption (TDE).
control: Enable TDE on all SQL/NoSQL production database instances containing personal data.

requirement: Conduct automated vulnerability scans monthly and apply critical patches within 72 hours.
control: Schedule monthly vulnerability scanning and implement an emergency patching process for critical CVEs.

requirement: Perform annual penetration testing and remediate critical findings within 30 days.
control: Engage a third-party security firm for annual testing and track remediation through a risk register.

requirement: Conduct a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) before commencing high-risk processing.
control: Implement a pre-project DPIA workflow for new technologies, large-scale data processing, or profiling.

requirement: A signed Data Processing Agreement (DPA) must be in place before sharing data with third parties.
control: Legal and Procurement must ensure GDPR-compliant DPAs are executed for all vendor contracts involving data.

requirement: Conduct an annual internal compliance audit covering privacy, security, and risk.
control: Schedule and execute an annual internal audit plan; produce reports within 30 days of completion.

requirement: Notify the supervisory authority of personal data breaches within 72 hours.
control: Integrate a breach notification timer and workflow into the Incident Response Plan.

requirement: All employees must complete mandatory annual data protection and information security training.
control: Deploy an LMS-based training module and track completion to meet the 95% minimum target.

requirement: Track and report compliance KPIs monthly to the DPO and quarterly to the Board.
control: Establish a compliance dashboard to monitor DSAR response, patch speed, MFA adoption, and training rates.
